name: preset-cli-skills
description: Preset CLI skills for explicit shell, scripting, and CI/CD workflows driven by the `sup` CLI (PyPI package `superset-sup`). Use only for CLI workflows; do not use for MCP-only work or as a substitute for direct API calls when the user wants HTTP/SDK code.

interface.shortDescription: CLI-only Preset skills (`sup`). Use preset-api-skills for HTTP/SDK code or preset-mcp-skills for MCP-only work.
interface.longDescription: Markdown skills for agents driving the Preset `sup` CLI (PyPI package `superset-sup`) for shell one-liners, batch exports, ad-hoc SQL, and CI/CD automation. Includes a non-destructive foundation skill and a separate Phase-5-style mutation skill that gates `push`, `--force`, `--overwrite`, and cross-workspace `sync` behind dry-run/preview and confirmation templates. Use only when the user explicitly asks for `sup`, the Preset CLI, shell automation, or CI scripting. MCP-only tool workflows are intentionally handled by the separate preset-mcp-skills package, and direct HTTP/SDK code paths are intentionally handled by the separate preset-api-skills package; route to whichever surface the user actually asked for.
defaultPrompt: Run an ad-hoc SQL query through sup
Export charts and dashboards as YAML with sup
Push chart YAML to a Preset workspace
